title: Newman and Cole Natural Wooden Hand Brushes - Choose from Hard Stiff Bristle Brush or Soft Brush with Natural or Synthetic Bristles (1 x Bassine Stiff Hand Brush)
features: QUALITY HAND HELD CLEANING BRUSH - The Newman and Cole wooden hand brush uses stiff natural bassine fibers to easily, and efficiently remove unwanted particles from any surface. As an everyday hand brush, it is very flexible and can be used as a floor brush, workshop brush, or carpet brush

COMFORTABLE GRIP - The ergonomically shaped handle of our wooden brushes are not only for aesthetic purposes but works to provide a decent sized surface area - for you to easily grip on to. It’s shape is wide enough to fit your palm, allowing you to maneuver our hand held cleaning brush comfortably and with ease - regardless of angle.

HEAVY DUTY BRUSH - The stiff, natural bassine bristles of our hand brush are firmly attached to its wooden base. Even with continuous heavy use, the bristles will remain firm while the wood base of our cleaner brush won't easily rot, even when continuously exposed to water. You are assured that the Newman and Cole handheld brush will last for a long time.

MULTI-FUNCTIONAL - Our hand brush with natural bassine bristles is a very effective and convenient cleaner brush to use around the house. It can be used as a floor cleaning brush, a workshop brush or to brush carpet clean of any dust or dirt. And because of its quality, you wont need to buy new hand brushes for cleaning any time soon.
Trusted Brand - Newman and Cole know what you want from a broom and aim to deliver exactly that!

Next page 1 Multi-Purpose Cleaning 2 Natural Bristles 3 Smooth Handle Multi-purpose Hand Brush For cleaning Indoor floors, workshop, carpet Rediscover the joy of cleaning with the Bassine Hand Brush. Featuring 100% natural bassine bristles, an ergonomic curved handle, a smooth wooden stock, and a convenient hanging eye, this brush is as functional as it is stylish. Perfectly suited for cleaning indoor floors, workshop areas, and carpets, it combines durability with efficiency. What materials are used in the Bassine Hand Brush? The brush is made with 100% natural bassine bristles and a polished wooden stock. The bassine bristles are durable, and tough on dirt, while the wooden handle ensures a smooth, comfortable grip. Is the brush suitable for all types of surfaces? Yes, the Bassine Hand Brush is versatile and works well on various surfaces, including indoor floors, carpets, and workshop areas. However, it’s best for hard surfaces and carpets rather than delicate or soft materials. How do I store the brush when not in use? The brush is equipped with a hanging eye, allowing you to easily hang it on hooks for convenient storage and quick access. Is the handle comfortable for extended use? Absolutely! The ergonomic curved handle is designed to provide a secure and comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue during prolonged cleaning sessions. How do I maintain the Bassine Hand Brush? To clean the brush, simply remove excess debris from the bristles and rinse with water if needed. Allow it to air dry in a well-ventilated area. Avoid prolonged exposure to moisture to preserve the wooden stock and bristles.
